aliases: file a memory under a topic node
blurb: Curate the memory store by hand: approve/retire/restore/forget memories, run reflect, check store health, file memories under topics, walk the taxonomy tree, stamp topic-route exemplars, decide topic suppression, share a memory tree over git, and probe recall.
intent: Point an agent at the human-facing controls for curating the cross-session memory store — the curation that is the whole point of memory being mutable. Covers the `/api/memory/*` Flask blueprint (`web/blueprints/memory.py`), the four-tab `MemoryView.vue` dashboard with its `frontend/src/components/memory/*` panels (including the `MemoryDoctor` health panel), and the `regin memory` Typer CLI (`cli/commands/memory.py`). These are the three coordinated entry points that wrap the `lib.memory` facade for reviewing distill proposals, fixing a memory's veracity, filing memories under topic nodes, walking the topic taxonomy, hand-curating signed topic-route exemplars, deciding which topic banners get withheld, sharing a memory tree over git, and probing what a query would surface.
label: Memory curation surfaces (Memory view, /api/memory/* blueprint, regin memory CLI)
